general_notes: Asset Qualifier / No-Ratio program. No income needed on 1003 — qualification is purely asset-based.
Available in 49 states. Ineligible: Orange County NY (FIPS 36071) and City of Baltimore MD (FIPS 24510).
Texas: purchase and R/T refi allowed; cash-out refi NOT allowed (effective 09-10-2025).
DTA (Debt-to-Asset ratio) required: Total Debts / Total Assets <= 60%.
No NOO/Investment — Primary and 2nd home only.
No tradelines required if borrower has 3 FICO scores.

location_restrictions: TX: purchase and R/T refi only — cash-out refi not allowed

additional_rules.income_doc: No income required — asset qualifier only
additional_rules.foreign_national: 2nd home only; need US bank account with ACH; max 2 acres
additional_rules.gift_funds: Allowed after min own-funds: 5% primary, 10% 2nd home, 15% FN. Cannot be used for reserves.
additional_rules.non_warrantable_condo: Allowed up to 60% LTV with condo cert
